name: agent-browser-priv
description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents

scripts.version: pnpm run version:sync && git add cli/Cargo.toml
scripts.build:native: pnpm run version:sync && cargo build --release --manifest-path cli/Cargo.toml && node scripts/copy-native.js
scripts.build:linux: pnpm run version:sync && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm build-linux
scripts.build:macos: pnpm run version:sync && (cargo build --release --manifest-path cli/Cargo.toml --target aarch64-apple-darwin & cargo build --release --manifest-path cli/Cargo.toml --target x86_64-apple-darwin & wait) && cp cli/target/aarch64-apple-darwin/release/agent-browser bin/agent-browser-priv-darwin-arm64 && cp cli/target/x86_64-apple-darwin/release/agent-browser bin/agent-browser-priv-darwin-x64
scripts.build:windows: pnpm run version:sync && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm build-windows
scripts.build:all-platforms: pnpm run version:sync && (pnpm run build:linux & pnpm run build:windows & wait) && pnpm run build:macos
scripts.release: pnpm run version:sync && pnpm run build:all-platforms
